routes.title: June 2026 Updates - Raijin, Halide, Shiori, Android, and Simulation
routes.summary: Progress update covering Raijin phase one, Project Halide, a Shiori Chrome extension, Android system work, competitive programming, and simulation work.

routes.title: Hackathons + Humanoid Simulation + UAV Conference + Breakout
routes.summary: Qualified for some interesting hackathons, Good progress is being done on training the humanoid robot + Will be attending a UAV conference + Breakout might have to wait a bit.

routes.title: playing around with an arm and a biped and rl
routes.summary: wanted to test the update page, so though might as well log about the biped, this is more of a random update.

routes.title: Project Halide, Building A Small-Model Diagnostic Workbench For Damaged Film
routes.summary: An open-weight film diagnostics workbench built around MiniCPM-V 4.6, Nemotron-Mini-4B, real negative failure cases, and a validator that became as important as the model.

routes.title: Teaching a 1.5B LLM to be a SOC Analyst (Without Burning Down the Network)
routes.summary: Fine-tuning a 1.5B LLM with GRPO to defend against realistic enterprise attack chains, and the unexpected lessons learned from reward hacking.

routes.title: Raijin LOB
routes.summary: C++ limit order book engine built around low-latency market microstructure ideas, benchmarked publicly and now moving toward a simulator phase.

routes.title: Project Halide
routes.summary: Small-model diagnostic workbench for damaged film scans using MiniCPM-V, Nemotron-Mini, strict validation, overlays, telemetry, and a Gradio light-table UI.

routes.title: Cybersec OpenEnv
routes.summary: Long-horizon cyber-defense POMDP for training and evaluating small LLM SOC agents with GRPO, realistic attack chains, and reward-hacking resistant containment incentives.

routes.title: Breakout-DQN
routes.summary: From-scratch Atari Breakout DQN study for building intuition around deep RL, preprocessing, replay, target networks, and early DeepMind-style agent design.
